scripts.dev:server: cd src-tauri && cargo watch -x 'run --features web-server --no-default-features --bin ars-web-server -- ../dist'
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev & npm run dev:server & wait
scripts.build:web-server: cd src-tauri && cargo build --features web-server --no-default-features --bin ars-web-server
scripts.serve:web: cd src-tauri && cargo run --features web-server --no-default-features --bin ars-web-server -- ../dist
